message:
perf(test): speed up internal/web and internal/util tests (gt-pp2t)

internal/web (~7s → ~2.5s):
- Use fast-failing "false" stub instead of real "gt" binary for
  TestAPIHandler_Crew and TestAPIHandler_Ready (tests only verify
  response structure on error, not actual gt output)
- Add newFastAPIHandler() helper for validation wiring tests that
  need command execution to fail fast (not search PATH for gt/bd)

internal/util (~11s → ~3.5s):
- Remove duplicate TestFindOrphanedClaudeProcesses_IgnoresTerminalProcesses
  which was identical to TestFindOrphanedClaudeProcesses (both just called
  FindOrphanedClaudeProcesses and logged results). Merge TTY verification
  comment into the remaining test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
